description:
GIVEN a game is in a final/completed state
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

*NOTE:* Game Tile designs for reference - [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN a user views a game tile for a completed game
steps.result:
THEN the teams are displayed away team above home team with team avitars
AND Broadcast Networks are displayed
AND player information is not displayed
AND the final score is not displayed
AND the team records are not displayed
